nasb.text: When Jesus saw him lying there, and knew that he had already been a long time in that condition, He *said to him, “Do you wish to get well?”

esv.text: When Jesus saw him lying there and knew that he had already been there a long time, he said to him, “Do you want to be healed?”

cnv.text: 耶穌看見他躺著，知道他病了很久，就問他：“你要痊愈嗎？”

ccb.text: 耶稣看他躺着，知道他病了很久，就问他：“你想痊愈吗？”

csbs.text: 耶稣见这个人躺在那里，知道他已经病了很久，就问他：“你想痊愈吗？”
